meaning: n.腹股沟,(水利工程)交叉拱v.使成穹窿形
examples: He kneed his attacker in the groin.
She kicked her attacker in the groin.
I underwent an operation on my groin once.
England suffered a further blow ahead of Sunday's third one-dayer when Kevin Pietersen (groin) was ruled out.
The England captain was also plagued by back and groin problems last season, limiting his involvement.
